◎简　　介  

　　A Copenhagen policeman called Robert (the superb Jakob Cedergren, familiar from Dagur Karí’s film Dark Horse) moves to a provincial town, where he has been temporarily reassigned after a recent case of professional misconduct. Another lingering cloudy day comes to an end in South Jutland and the arrival of the young man from the big city is met by a look of curious satisfaction...
